name: Mississippi Delta Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg yolks and sugar in the bowl of an electric mixer and beat until light and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add the bourbon, beating on low speed.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff. Fold it into the egg-yolk mixture.
4. In a clean bowl, whip the egg whites until stiff and fold them into the eggnog.
5. Serve in goblets, preferably silver, with a generous grating of nutmeg on top.
